name: gt-sirm-web
description: GT-SIRM Web (PWA) — GnuTux Short Islamic Reels Maker — قابل للتحزيم إلى APK عبر Capacitor
author: SalehGNUTUX <https://github.com/SalehGNUTUX>

scripts.build:apk:debug: cap sync android && cd android && ./gradlew assembleDebug
scripts.build:apk:release: cap sync android && cd android && ./gradlew assembleRelease
scripts.build:bundle: cap sync android && cd android && ./gradlew bundleRelease
